title: eDNA Extraction Using Phenol-Chloroform-Isoamyl Alcohol from Filters in Longmire Buffer
author: Ana Ramón-Laca
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bx4apqse

steps.title: heat-shockFilters in 2 ml of Longmire...
steps.instruction: heat-shockFilters in 2 ml of Longmire buffer at 95C for 5' and then allow samples to cool to room temperature

steps.title: digestionadd 100 µl proteinase K (final concentration 1 mg ml-1)
steps.instruction: digestionadd 100 µl proteinase K (final concentration 1 mg ml-1)

steps.title: phase lock set upadd ca
steps.instruction: phase lock set upadd ca. 800 µl of vacuum grease with a syringe onto the wall of the tube of the 5 ml tube

steps.title: centrifugationshake well and spin 13
steps.instruction: centrifugationshake well and spin 13.3 x g for 5' at 4C

steps.title: phase lock set upplace ca
steps.instruction: phase lock set upplace ca. 800 µl of vacuum grease in 2 sets of empty tubes for CI. (These can be prefilled for convenience)

steps.title: centrifugationshake and spin 13
steps.instruction: centrifugationshake and spin 13.3 x g for 5' at 4C

steps.title: CIadd 2
steps.instruction: CIadd 2.2 ml of chloroform:isoamyl 24:1 and decant aqueous layer from step 9

steps.title: centrifugationshake and spin 13
steps.instruction: centrifugationshake and spin 13.3 x g for 5' at 4C

steps.title: Isopropanoladd 2 ml of isopropanol (can...
steps.instruction: Isopropanoladd 2 ml of isopropanol (can be prefilled for convenience), add 80 µl of 5M NaCl and decant aqueous layer from step 11

steps.title: wash x2pour liquid off slowly and...
steps.instruction: wash x2pour liquid off slowly and add 800 µl of ice cold 70% EtOH

steps.title: centrifugationshake and spin 13
steps.instruction: centrifugationshake and spin 13.3 x g for 5' at 4C and repeat wash

steps.title: dryingpour liquid off slowly and allow...
steps.instruction: dryingpour liquid off slowly and allow tubes to dry for 1 h or until dry

steps.title: resuspensiononce they are dry, resuspend in...
steps.instruction: resuspensiononce they are dry, resuspend in 100 µl TE buffer (warm - 37C)

steps.title: CI add 2
steps.instruction: CI add 2.2 ml of chloroform:isoamyl 24:1 and decant aqueous layer from step 6. Important: only add the chloroform just before use (while the tubes with PCI are in the centrifuge) so it does not affect the phase lock if grease is at the bottom.
